examples.title: Accessible Modal Component
examples.description: Build an accessible modal dialog with focus trap, keyboard handling, and screen reader support.

input.context: Need a reusable modal component for React. Must trap focus, close on Escape, restore focus on close. WCAG AA compliant.

expected_output.prop_table:
| Prop | Type | Default | Required | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| isOpen | boolean | false | yes | Controls modal visibility |
| onClose | () => void | - | yes | Called on close action |
| title | string | - | yes | Modal title (announced by screen reader) |
| children | React.ReactNode | - | yes | Modal content |
| size | 'sm' \| 'md' \| 'lg' | 'md' | no | Modal width variant |
expected_output.keyboard_table:
| Key | Action | Context |
|---|---|---|
| Escape | Close modal | When modal is open |
| Tab | Move focus to next focusable | Trapped within modal |
| Shift+Tab | Move focus to previous focusable | Trapped within modal |

examples.title: Design Token System
examples.description: Create a design token system for a new component library.

input.context: Starting a new React component library. Need foundational design tokens: colors (primary, neutral, semantic), spacing (4px base), typography (Inter font family), and shadows.

expected_output.token_table:
| Token | Value | Usage | Category | Tag |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| --color-primary-500 | #3B82F6 | Primary actions, links | color | [GEN] |
| --color-neutral-100 | #F3F4F6 | Backgrounds | color | [GEN] |
| --spacing-md | 16px | Standard gap | spacing | [GEN] |
| --font-family-base | 'Inter', sans-serif | Body text | typography | [GEN] |

examples.title: Performance Triage (Low Energy)
examples.description: Quick triage of a slow-loading page.

input.context: Dashboard page takes 8 seconds to load. Bundle is 2.4MB. No code splitting. 47 API calls on mount. Using Redux with everything in one store.

expected_output.triage_table:
| Issue | Impact | Quick Fix | Confidence | Tag |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| No code splitting | 2.4MB bundle blocks render | React.lazy + Suspense on routes | 0.9 | [DRV] |
| 47 API calls on mount | Network waterfall | Aggregate/batch, load on demand | 0.85 | [DRV] |
| Single Redux store | Unnecessary re-renders | Split stores or switch to Zustand | 0.6 | [SPEC] |
expected_output.energy_note: Low energy: triage table + top 3 quick wins. No full audit. Escalate for Lighthouse run.
